---
description: Load these instructions when the task involves writing, reviewing, or explaining code in this project
---

# Agent Guidelines

- Answer in Vietnamese, code in English
- Be concise, no emojis, no unnecessary explanations
- Ask for clarification before coding if requirements are unclear

**Code:** Clean, minimal, no unnecessary comments, simple over complex, consistent naming

**Output:** No explanations unless asked, no restating the problem, stay on task

**Writing code:** Complete and runnable, no placeholders, no unused imports, follow language best practices

**Reviewing code:** Focus on correctness, readability, performance — point out issues directly, suggest improvements only when needed

**Unclear requirements:** Ask specific questions, do not guess intent
